name: cipherchat-monorepo
description: Root scripts for local production builds (Railway uses railway.toml).

scripts.build:web: npm --prefix apps/web install && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.build:production: npm run build:web && npm run stage:client
scripts.render:build: npm ci --prefix apps/web && npm run build --prefix apps/web && node scripts/stage-client.mjs && npm ci --prefix apps/server
